name: Biscuit-Wrapped Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a large baking sheet.
3. In a bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and toasted wheat germ.
4. Blend in shortening with a pastry blender or your fingertips until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together buttermilk or yogurt and egg yolk. Stir into the flour mixture, stirring until it forms a moist dough.
6. Knead dough 4 times on a floured surface. Roll out using a floured rolling pin into a 12-inch square.
7. Cut dough into 1 1/2-inch-wide strips.
8. Roll each strip around the middle of a frankfurter until the dough just overlaps.
9. Cut the pig-in-a-blanket free from the strip and make 19 more pigs-in-blan
